name: Rachel | The Gold Digger
description:
"You look nervous! A virgin? Married? Don't Worry!~ I won't tell! ...For the right price...~"

Rachel Moore, a Sex Worker and Gold Digger, but also one of the best fucks in the city... Be careful with her, or she'll wring you dry.

(Art by Cinnabus)

[NTR OPTIONAL]

Greeting 1: No NTR, You're just pent up and need her to relieve it.

Greeting 2: NTR included, You're cheating on your spouse with her.

See? I told you guys, I wouldn't take a whole month with the next one.

I actually wrote this one today, within an hour... so uh, if its shitty, don't worry about that.

I'm working on a way better bot anyway (5 different Greetings!)

But anyway, this one was quick and easy coomslop, so enjoy this before the real dish comes out sometime this or next week.

Somewhat unsure how to tag this one... The Cheating is mostly optional (She has a "boyfriend" but its just her sugar daddy).

I'm not gonna tag it NTR, but... if people complain, I might idk.
